name: The Triple Baka House
description:
Original is on TikTok and YT. Just search Triple Baka series.

Welcome to the Triple Baka apartment, where it’s absolutely hell and nobody can get along! The inhabitants are Miku, Brazilian Miku, Mimukauwa, Teto, Neru, and Mesmerizer Miku!

(Sonic+ Eggman+ Metal Sonic+ Agnes Tachyon update soon)
creator: Voidstarr
